parsed.production_notes: The video features live-action footage of a person's hands interacting with a real smartphone in various physical environments. The lighting, shadows, and background elements like the iced tea and moving escalator appear natural and consistent with human-recorded video.

characters.appearance: Only hands are visible. Light complexion. Manicured nails featuring a mix of solid dark polish and silver/glittery designs.
characters.demeanor: Casual and engaged, demonstrating active use of the phone.

scenes.setting: Cafe, daytime, iced tea glass, warm lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot focuses entirely on Character A's hands holding a smartphone. The hands have a light complexion and manicured nails, with some painted a solid dark color and others featuring a silver design. The thumb is positioned over the blank screen, poised to tap. In the softly blurred background, a tall glass filled with a brown liquid and ice sits on a surface. The lighting is bright and warm, suggesting a daytime cafe setting. The composition centers the phone, drawing attention to the interaction between the hands and the device.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a close-up of hands holding a smartphone in a cafe setting, with an iced drink blurred in the background. The phone screen displays an English learning app interface with text and a play button. Large Korean text overlays appear sequentially at the top of the screen, acting as captions for the voiceover. The user's thumb taps the screen to interact with the app. The overall vibe is casual and relatable.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 여러분 스픽 있잖아요. [You know Speak, right.]
Character A says: 내가 원할 때 언제 어디서나 할 수 있다고 하길래 제가 해봤거든요? [They said I could do it whenever and wherever I want, so I tried it.]
Character A says: 근데 이거 진짜 할만 하더라구요? [But this is actually really doable?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
여러분 스픽 있잖아요 (You know Speak, right)
내가 원할 때 언제 어디서나 할 수 있다고 하길래 (They said I could do it whenever and wherever I want)
제가 해봤거든요? 🤔 (so I tried it? 🤔)
근데 이거 진짜 할만 하더라구요? (But this is actually really doable?)

scenes.setting: Outdoors, daytime, blurred street background, natural lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot captures Character A's hands gripping a smartphone. The hands, with their distinct dark and silver manicured nails, are the primary focus. The thumb rests near the bottom of the blank screen. The background is heavily blurred, displaying warm, natural light and indistinct shapes that suggest an outdoor street or public area. The lighting highlights the hands and the edges of the phone. The framing remains tight on the device, emphasizing mobile usage on the go.

scenes.visual_description: The shot remains a close-up on the hands holding the phone, now against a blurred outdoor background. The app interface on the screen shows an English sentence and audio controls. Korean text overlays pop up at the top, matching the spoken narration. The user continues to interact with the app using their thumb. The scene conveys the app's portability.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: 친구 만나기 전에 버스 정류장이나, 길거리에서도 한 번 해보고. [Before meeting a friend, I tried it at the bus stop or on the street.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
친구 만나기 전에 (Before meeting a friend)
버스 정류장이나, 길거리에서도 한 번 해보고 (I tried it at the bus stop or on the street)

scenes.setting: Escalator, moving handrail, cool artificial lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A's hands are shown in a tight close-up, holding a smartphone. The manicured nails with dark and silver polish are clearly visible as the thumb interacts with the blank screen. Behind the phone, a blurred, dark surface moves steadily downwards, resembling the rubber handrail of an escalator. The lighting in this environment is cooler and more artificial compared to previous shots. The composition keeps the phone centered while the moving background implies transit. The focus remains sharply on the hands and the device.

scenes.visual_description: The camera maintains a close-up on the smartphone held by the user's hands. The background shows a moving black escalator handrail, indicating transit. The phone screen displays the learning app with English phrases and a microphone icon. Korean text overlays appear at the top of the frame. The user taps the screen to progress through the lesson.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 지하철 타러가면서 에스컬레이터에서도 해봤는데. [I also tried it on the escalator while going to take the subway.]
Character A says: 시간도 잘 가고 은근 중독 되는거 있죠?ㅋㅋ [Time flies and it's surprisingly addictive, you know? haha]
scenes.on_screen_text:
지하철 타러가면서 에스컬레이터에서도 해봤는데 (I also tried it on the escalator while going to take the subway)
시간도 잘 가고 은근 중독 되는거 있죠?ㅋㅋ (Time flies and it's surprisingly addictive, you know? haha)

scenes.setting: Dark room, nighttime, indistinct bedding background, screen glow lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot shows Character A's hands holding a smartphone in a dimly lit environment. The hands and manicured nails are illuminated primarily by the glow emanating from the blank screen. The background is dark and out of focus, with soft textures suggesting bedding or blankets in a darkened room. The thumb is seen tapping the screen. The low-light setting creates an intimate and quiet atmosphere. The framing continues to isolate the hands and the phone as the central subjects.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shifts to a dark environment, likely a bedroom, with the hands holding the phone illuminated by the screen's glow. The app interface shows a video clip of a person and then transitions to a lesson completion screen. Korean text overlays are displayed at the top. The user taps the screen to continue. The atmosphere is quiet, suggesting late-night studying.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 그냥 틈날때 한 번 씩 했는데. [I just did it once in a while when I had free time.]
Character A says: 오늘 하루 배운 문장이 100문장이 넘는다는 거예요. [And it says I learned over 100 sentences today.]
Character A says: 여러분도 한 번 스픽 해보세요! [Everyone, try Speak too!]
Character A says: 잠드는 순간에 기분이 달라질 거예요. [You'll feel different when you fall asleep.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
그냥 틈날때 한 번 씩 했는데 (I just did it once in a while when I had free time)
오늘 하루 배운 문장이 100문장이 넘는다는 거예요 (And it says I learned over 100 sentences today)
여러분도 한 번 스픽 해보세요! (Everyone, try Speak too!)
잠드는 순간에 기분이 달라질 거예요 🌝 (You'll feel different when you fall asleep 🌝)

panels.panel_visual_description: A completely blank, solid vibrant blue canvas fills the entire frame. There are no characters, props, or environmental details present. The lighting is flat and uniform across the surface. The composition is entirely empty, serving as a solid color background. No textures or gradients are visible.

scenes.visual_description: The video concludes with a static end card. The background is a solid, bright blue. In the center, the 'Speak' logo is displayed prominently in white, along with Korean text promoting the app. Below the logo, there are badges for the App Store and Google Play. The layout is clean and focused on brand recognition and a call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: 영어 스피킹은 스픽. [English speaking is Speak.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
영어 스피킹은 (English speaking is)
Speak
지금 다운받고 영어 공부 시작하기 (Download now and start studying English)
App Store
Google Play
